description: Build a phase diagram for a chemical system from Materials Project entries, list the stable phases on the convex hull, and (optionally) report the energy above hull / decomposition for a target composition.
rules: read-only — queries the Materials Project database; does not mutate any remote service
requires the mp-api package, a valid MP_API_KEY, and network access
CHEMSYS must contain at least 2 elements (e.g. Li-Fe-O)
COMPOSITION is optional — when set, the perk reports stability (energy above hull / decomposition)
stability report written to phasediagram.log under record_store; degrades gracefully (records missing dep / key, exits 0) when offline
usage: Set CHEMSYS (e.g. Li-Fe-O) and optionally COMPOSITION (e.g. LiFeO2). Requires MP_API_KEY in the environment. Output: phasediagram.log under record_store.
limitation: Cannot run without mp-api + MP_API_KEY + network. The plot/image output of the underlying script is not produced (headless); only the textual stability report is captured. Without the dependencies the porter writes a graceful stub and a missing-dependency note.
